title: The Still Small Voice

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: The wind broke branches, the earth split stone
The fire lit shadows, but left me alone
I searched through thunder, I begged the flame
But the hush that followed, whispered my name

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Not in the quake, not in the blaze
Not in the fury the world displays
But when all the clamor falls into grace
A hush arrives, and takes its place

sections.label: Instrumental
lines: It's the still small voice that finds me
Soft as silence, deep as night
No roaring sign, no blinding light
But in the quiet, I know what’s right
Yeah, it’s the still small voice that finds me

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I built my altars on noise and speed
Till silence cracked me, just to plant a seed
And in that silence, so sweet, so thin
I felt the breath of love begin

sections.label: Pre-Chorus 2
lines: Not in the war cries, not in the gold
Not in the tales the prophets told
But in a sigh the soul can’t fake
The hush that heals what life might break

sections.label: Chorus 2
lines: It’s the still small voice that holds me
Woven in a sacred thread
Through every ache, through words unsaid
It sings in places fear once bled
Yes, it’s the still small voice that holds me

sections.label: Spoken
lines: Not in the noise, not in the need
But in the pause between each beat
Where heaven waits with patient grace
And time dissolves in that soft place

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: It’s the still small voice within me
Calling out without a sound
A holy hush that wraps around
And plants my feet on sacred ground
Yes, it’s the still small voice...
The whisper that remains

epigraph: and after the fire a still small voice
